summary: Script is excellent: proper `set -euo pipefail`, comprehensive input validation, clear error handling, date math in UTC epochs. Workflow violates critical requirement: `actions/checkout@v4` is unpinned—best_practices requires full-length commit SHA (40 hex chars). Minor duplication in markdown/json report steps (lines 68–77 vs 82–87) both set `FIXTURE`/`WARNING_DAYS`. If action pinning fixed, would be 4/5 overall.
